  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resources Executive",
  "description": "Jaypecstar Academy - Our mission is to focus on the individual child, recognizing their unique abilities and potential. By fostering a nurturing and inspiring environment, we aim to bring out the best in every child, equipping them with the skills, confidence, and values needed to excel in all areas of life.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Human Resources Executive

Job Location: Lugbe, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 5 years of experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application letter to: Jaypecstaracademy@gmail.com using the&nbsp;Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only candidates within Lugbe and Its Environs will be contacted.",

Human Resources Executive Job at Jaypecstar Academy




        
    

        
        Jaypecstar Academy - Our mission is to focus on the individual child, recognizing their unique abilities and potential. By fostering a nurturing and inspiring environment, we aim to bring out the best in every child, equipping them with the skills, confidence, and values needed to excel in all areas of life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Human Resources Executive

Job Location: Lugbe, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Qualifications
     

            
    




	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 5 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only candidates within Lugbe and Its Environs will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Mechanical Manager",
  "description": "Speciality Group, established in 2011, has grown into a powerhouse of innovation and integration. Starting with a steel plant in Ife, we expanded into paper manufacturing in 2017 to support the local packaging industry. Today, our diverse portfolio includes cassava starch production, corrugated box manufacturing, and the recent addition of a state-of-the-art white paper plant, operational since July 2024. Equipped with cutting-edge technology, we deliver precision and quality across every product we create, driving sustainable solutions for industries far and wide.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Mechanical Manager

Job Location: Nigeria
Division: Corrugation

Description


	We are seeking experienced professionals to join our Corrugation Division in Nigeria.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications
	Relevant experience in the corrugation industry
	Keep Knowledge of Corrugation Plant, as BHS Machine, topera, EMBA, erection &amp; installation, and Machine Problem solve.
	Ability to&nbsp;work in a production environment.


Benefits


	Free Visa
	Free Air Ticket
	Accommodation Provided
	Medical Facilities
	Salary &ndash; Negotiable (based on experience)


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: timeoffice.sppl@specialitygroupng.com using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information WhatsApp: +234 9116042302",

Mechanical Manager Job at Speciality Group




        
    

        
        Speciality Group, established in 2011, has grown into a powerhouse of innovation and integration. Starting with a steel plant in Ife, we expanded into paper manufacturing in 2017 to support the local packaging industry. Today, our diverse portfolio includes cassava starch production, corrugated box manufacturing, and the recent addition of a state-of-the-art white paper plant, operational since July 2024. Equipped with cutting-edge technology, we deliver precision and quality across every product we create, driving sustainable solutions for industries far and wide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Mechanical Manager

Job Location: Nigeria
Division: Corrugation
     

            
    



Description


	We are seeking experienced professionals to join our Corrugation Division in Nigeria.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications
	Relevant experience in the corrugation industry
	Keep Knowledge of Corrugation Plant, as BHS Machine, topera, EMBA, erection & installation, and Machine Problem solve.
	Ability to work in a production environment.


Benefits


	Free Visa
	Free Air Ticket
	Accommodation Provided
	Medical Facilities
	Salary – Negotiable (based on experience)


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information WhatsApp: +234 9116042302    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Care Assistant",
  "description": "Bioventures Limited is a health-focused biomedical equipment and medical supplies company dedicated to the distribution and supply of high-quality medical equipment, laboratory instruments, and essential healthcare products. We serve hospitals, diagnostic laboratories, research institutions, clinics, and academic facilities with reliable tools that support accurate diagnosis, effective treatment, and advanced scientific research.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

&nbsp;Job Position: Personal Care Assistant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for a competent personal care assistant to support physically or mentally challenged customers in their everyday lives.
	The fulfilment and satisfaction that comes with helping others surpasses the challenges of this&nbsp;&nbsp;job.
	If you&rsquo;re a compassionate, positive person who isn&rsquo;t afraid to work hard, then this is a job for you.
	We expect you to be polite and a good communicator.


Responsibilities


	Ensure clients receive their medication on time.
	Support clients who can&rsquo;t move on their own.
	Help clients dress, bathe, eat etc.
	Assist clients with physical therapy exercises.
	Cook meals according to the customer&rsquo;s restrictions.
	Help customers with their shopping.
	Do necessary housekeeping to maintain a clean environment.
	Provide emotional support.
	Inform physicians or supervisors about uncommon events.
	Act quickly and responsibly in cases of emergency.


Requirements and skills


	High school diploma or equivalent.
	Must be based in Lagos.
	Experience in housekeeping tasks and caring for the elderly or sick will make you a strong candidate.
	Committed to health &amp; safety.
	Well-organized and reliable.
	Excellent communication and people skills.
	Positive and compassionate attitude.
	Strong ethics.
	Physical stamina.


Salary
N150,000 - N300,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resumes to: hr.bioventures@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

Personal Care Assistant Job at Bioventures Limited




        
    

        
        Bioventures Limited is a health-focused biomedical equipment and medical supplies company dedicated to the distribution and supply of high-quality medical equipment, laboratory instruments, and essential healthcare products. We serve hospitals, diagnostic laboratories, research institutions, clinics, and academic facilities with reliable tools that support accurate diagnosis, effective treatment, and advanced scientific research.

We are recruiting to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: Personal Care Assistant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

            
    




	We are looking for a competent personal care assistant to support physically or mentally challenged customers in their everyday lives.
	The fulfilment and satisfaction that comes with helping others surpasses the challenges of this  job.
	If you’re a compassionate, positive person who isn’t afraid to work hard, then this is a job for you.
	We expect you to be polite and a good communicator.


Responsibilities


	Ensure clients receive their medication on time.
	Support clients who can’t move on their own.
	Help clients dress, bathe, eat etc.
	Assist clients with physical therapy exercises.
	Cook meals according to the customer’s restrictions.
	Help customers with their shopping.
	Do necessary housekeeping to maintain a clean environment.
	Provide emotional support.
	Inform physicians or supervisors about uncommon events.
	Act quickly and responsibly in cases of emergency.


Requirements and skills


	High school diploma or equivalent.
	Must be based in Lagos.
	Experience in housekeeping tasks and caring for the elderly or sick will make you a strong candidate.
	Committed to health & safety.
	Well-organized and reliable.
	Excellent communication and people skills.
	Positive and compassionate attitude.
	Strong ethics.
	Physical stamina.


Salary
N150,000 - N300,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resumes to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Adventure Capital is a venture capital investor focused on accelerating entrepreneurial companies, with activity in consulting and Nigeria&#39;s FinTech sector. Known for its involvement in high-growth, early-stage businesses, the firm notably invested in the Nigerian mobility startup Gokada.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Maryland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative, data-driven, and results-oriented Digital Marketer to develop and execute digital marketing strategies that increase brand awareness, generate leads, drive customer acquisition, and support business growth.
	The ideal candidate should have strong knowledge of digital marketing channels, content creation, social media management, paid advertising, SEO, and analytics.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement digital marketing strategies aligned with the company&#39;s business objectives.
	Manage the company&#39;s social media platforms and maintain a consistent brand presence across digital channels.
	Create, curate, and publish engaging content across social media, websites, email, and other digital platforms.
	Plan and execute paid digital advertising campaigns across platforms such as Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and other relevant channels.
	Monitor and optimize digital campaigns to improve reach, engagement, lead generation, conversion, and return on investment.
	Conduct keyword research and support the implementation of SEO strategies to improve website visibility and organic traffic.
	Develop and manage email marketing campaigns and customer communication initiatives.
	Track and analyze digital marketing performance using relevant analytics and reporting tools.
	Prepare regular reports on campaign performance, website traffic, social media engagement, lead generation, and conversion metrics.
	Conduct market and competitor research to identify emerging trends and new digital growth opportunities.
	Collaborate with the creative, sales, and business development teams to develop campaigns that support customer acquisition and revenue growth.
	Stay updated on emerging digital marketing trends, platforms, tools, and best practices.
	Manage the digital marketing budget effectively and ensure optimal use of available resources.
	Perform other marketing-related duties as assigned.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Performance will be assessed based on:


	Growth in website traffic and digital reach.
	Social media growth and engagement.
	Number and quality of leads generated.
	Customer acquisition and conversion rates.
	Performance and ROI of paid advertising campaigns.
	Email marketing open, click-through, and conversion rates.
	Organic search rankings and traffic growth.
	Overall contribution of digital marketing activities to business growth.


Requirements and Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree
	4 years of experience in digital marketing or a similar role.
	Proven experience managing social media platforms and digital marketing campaigns.
	Hands-on experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Analytics, and other digital marketing tools.
	Good knowledge of SEO, SEM, email marketing, content marketing, and social media marketing.
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills.
	Ability to analyze data and use insights to improve campaign performance.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office and relevant digital marketing software.
	Experience with Canva or other graphic design tools is an added advantage.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong organizational and project management skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
	Creative mindset with a strong focus on achieving measurable results.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: evelyn.olanrewaju@adventurecapital.com.ng using &quot;Digital Marketer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Digital Marketer Job at Adventure Capital Group




        
    

        
        Adventure Capital is a venture capital investor focused on accelerating entrepreneurial companies, with activity in consulting and Nigeria's FinTech sector. Known for its involvement in high-growth, early-stage businesses, the firm notably invested in the Nigerian mobility startup Gokada.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Maryland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for a creative, data-driven, and results-oriented Digital Marketer to develop and execute digital marketing strategies that increase brand awareness, generate leads, drive customer acquisition, and support business growth.
	The ideal candidate should have strong knowledge of digital marketing channels, content creation, social media management, paid advertising, SEO, and analytics.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement digital marketing strategies aligned with the company's business objectives.
	Manage the company's social media platforms and maintain a consistent brand presence across digital channels.
	Create, curate, and publish engaging content across social media, websites, email, and other digital platforms.
	Plan and execute paid digital advertising campaigns across platforms such as Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and other relevant channels.
	Monitor and optimize digital campaigns to improve reach, engagement, lead generation, conversion, and return on investment.
	Conduct keyword research and support the implementation of SEO strategies to improve website visibility and organic traffic.
	Develop and manage email marketing campaigns and customer communication initiatives.
	Track and analyze digital marketing performance using relevant analytics and reporting tools.
	Prepare regular reports on campaign performance, website traffic, social media engagement, lead generation, and conversion metrics.
	Conduct market and competitor research to identify emerging trends and new digital growth opportunities.
	Collaborate with the creative, sales, and business development teams to develop campaigns that support customer acquisition and revenue growth.
	Stay updated on emerging digital marketing trends, platforms, tools, and best practices.
	Manage the digital marketing budget effectively and ensure optimal use of available resources.
	Perform other marketing-related duties as assigned.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Performance will be assessed based on:


	Growth in website traffic and digital reach.
	Social media growth and engagement.
	Number and quality of leads generated.
	Customer acquisition and conversion rates.
	Performance and ROI of paid advertising campaigns.
	Email marketing open, click-through, and conversion rates.
	Organic search rankings and traffic growth.
	Overall contribution of digital marketing activities to business growth.


Requirements and Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree
	4 years of experience in digital marketing or a similar role.
	Proven experience managing social media platforms and digital marketing campaigns.
	Hands-on experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Analytics, and other digital marketing tools.
	Good knowledge of SEO, SEM, email marketing, content marketing, and social media marketing.
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills.
	Ability to analyze data and use insights to improve campaign performance.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office and relevant digital marketing software.
	Experience with Canva or other graphic design tools is an added advantage.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong organizational and project management skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
	Creative mindset with a strong focus on achieving measurable results.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Digital Marketer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Registered Nurse",
  "description": "OCA Consulting is a dynamic human resources consultancy headquartered in Nigeria, dedicated to providing bespoke people-management solutions for both established enterprises and ambitious start-ups.

At OCA Consulting, we believe that a business&rsquo;s greatest asset is its people, and its greatest risk is mismanaging them. We bridge the gap where many small and medium-sized businesses find themselves stretched&mdash;needing strategic HR infrastructure to grow, but lacking the in-house capacity to build it. We don&rsquo;t just offer advice; we build the operational frameworks that allow businesses to scale confidently.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Registered Nurse
Job Location: Benin City - Edo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Registered Nurse (RN) is responsible for providing high-quality, patient-centered nursing care in accordance with professional standards, hospital policies, and regulatory requirements.
	The RN assesses, plans, implements, and evaluates patient care while collaborating with physicians and other healthcare professionals to ensure optimal patient outcomes.


Key Responsibilities
Patient Care:


	Conduct comprehensive nursing assessments of patients upon admission and throughout hospitalization.
	Develop, implement, and evaluate individualized nursing care plans.
	Monitor, record, and report patients&#39; conditions, vital signs, symptoms, and progress.
	Administer medications and treatments safely and accurately as prescribed by physicians.
	Perform nursing procedures such as wound dressing, catheterization, IV therapy, injections, and specimen collection.
	Recognize changes in patient conditions and initiate appropriate interventions.
	Respond promptly and effectively to medical emergencies.


Clinical Documentation:


	Maintain accurate, timely, and complete patient records in electronic or paper-based systems.
	Document assessments, interventions, medications, treatments, and patient responses.
	Ensure confidentiality and security of patient information.


Patient Education:


	Educate patients and their families on disease conditions, medications, treatment plans, and discharge instructions.
	Provide health promotion and disease prevention counseling.
	Encourage patient participation in care decisions.


Collaboration and Communication:


	Collaborate effectively with physicians, pharmacists, laboratory personnel, and other multidisciplinary team members.
	Participate in ward rounds and clinical discussions.
	Communicate patient information during shift handovers using established protocols.


Infection Prevention and Control:


	Adhere strictly to infection prevention and control policies and procedures.
	Maintain a clean, safe, and therapeutic environment for patients and staff.
	Ensure proper use of personal protective equipment (PPE).


Quality and Safety:


	Comply with hospital policies, nursing standards, and ethical guidelines.
	Participate in quality improvement initiatives and patient safety programs.
	Report incidents, accidents, and near misses promptly.
	Ensure safe handling and administration of medications.


Equipment Management:


	Operate and monitor medical equipment safely and effectively.
	Ensure nursing equipment is clean, functional, and appropriately maintained.
	Report equipment malfunctions promptly.


Professional Development:


	Participate in continuing professional development (CPD) activities.
	Attend departmental meetings, training sessions, and mandatory education programs.
	Maintain current nursing knowledge and competencies.


Qualifications and Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor of Nursing Science (B.NSc.), Registered Nurse (RN), or equivalent qualification from an accredited institution.


Professional Certification:


	Current registration and valid practicing license with the appropriate nursing regulatory body (e.g., the Nursing and Midwifery Council of Nigeria).
	Additional certifications such as Basic Life Support (BLS) and Advanced Cardiovascular Life Support (ACLS) are an advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 1&ndash;3 years of clinical nursing experience in a hospital or healthcare setting.
	Experience in medical-surgical, emergency, pediatric, ICU, or specialty nursing is an added advantage.


Required Skills and Competencies:
Clinical Competencies:


	Strong patient assessment and clinical decision-making skills.
	Competence in medication administration and nursing procedures.
	Knowledge of infection prevention and control practices.


Core Skills:


	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities.
	Ability to&nbsp;&nbsp;work effectively under pressure and in emergency situations.
	Good documentation and record-keeping skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team.

Registered Nurse Job at OCA Consulting




        
    

        
        OCA Consulting is a dynamic human resources consultancy headquartered in Nigeria, dedicated to providing bespoke people-management solutions for both established enterprises and ambitious start-ups.

At OCA Consulting, we believe that a business’s greatest asset is its people, and its greatest risk is mismanaging them. We bridge the gap where many small and medium-sized businesses find themselves stretched—needing strategic HR infrastructure to grow, but lacking the in-house capacity to build it. We don’t just offer advice; we build the operational frameworks that allow businesses to scale confidently.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Registered Nurse
Job Location: Benin City - Edo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Registered Nurse (RN) is responsible for providing high-quality, patient-centered nursing care in accordance with professional standards, hospital policies, and regulatory requirements.
	The RN assesses, plans, implements, and evaluates patient care while collaborating with physicians and other healthcare professionals to ensure optimal patient outcomes.


Key Responsibilities
Patient Care:


	Conduct comprehensive nursing assessments of patients upon admission and throughout hospitalization.
	Develop, implement, and evaluate individualized nursing care plans.
	Monitor, record, and report patients' conditions, vital signs, symptoms, and progress.
	Administer medications and treatments safely and accurately as prescribed by physicians.
	Perform nursing procedures such as wound dressing, catheterization, IV therapy, injections, and specimen collection.
	Recognize changes in patient conditions and initiate appropriate interventions.
	Respond promptly and effectively to medical emergencies.


Clinical Documentation:


	Maintain accurate, timely, and complete patient records in electronic or paper-based systems.
	Document assessments, interventions, medications, treatments, and patient responses.
	Ensure confidentiality and security of patient information.


Patient Education:


	Educate patients and their families on disease conditions, medications, treatment plans, and discharge instructions.
	Provide health promotion and disease prevention counseling.
	Encourage patient participation in care decisions.


Collaboration and Communication:


	Collaborate effectively with physicians, pharmacists, laboratory personnel, and other multidisciplinary team members.
	Participate in ward rounds and clinical discussions.
	Communicate patient information during shift handovers using established protocols.


Infection Prevention and Control:


	Adhere strictly to infection prevention and control policies and procedures.
	Maintain a clean, safe, and therapeutic environment for patients and staff.
	Ensure proper use of personal protective equipment (PPE).


Quality and Safety:


	Comply with hospital policies, nursing standards, and ethical guidelines.
	Participate in quality improvement initiatives and patient safety programs.
	Report incidents, accidents, and near misses promptly.
	Ensure safe handling and administration of medications.


Equipment Management:


	Operate and monitor medical equipment safely and effectively.
	Ensure nursing equipment is clean, functional, and appropriately maintained.
	Report equipment malfunctions promptly.


Professional Development:


	Participate in continuing professional development (CPD) activities.
	Attend departmental meetings, training sessions, and mandatory education programs.
	Maintain current nursing knowledge and competencies.


Qualifications and Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor of Nursing Science (B.NSc.), Registered Nurse (RN), or equivalent qualification from an accredited institution.


Professional Certification:


	Current registration and valid practicing license with the appropriate nursing regulatory body (e.g., the Nursing and Midwifery Council of Nigeria).
	Additional certifications such as Basic Life Support (BLS) and Advanced Cardiovascular Life Support (ACLS) are an advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 1–3 years of clinical nursing experience in a hospital or healthcare setting.
	Experience in medical-surgical, emergency, pediatric, ICU, or specialty nursing is an added advantage.


Required Skills and Competencies:
Clinical Competencies:


	Strong patient assessment and clinical decision-making skills.
	Competence in medication administration and nursing procedures.
	Knowledge of infection prevention and control practices.


Core Skills:


	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities.
	Ability to  work effectively under pressure and in emergency situations.
	Good documentation and record-keeping skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team.
	Compassion, empathy, and professionalism.


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in Electronic Medical Records (EMR) systems.
	Competency in Microsoft Office applications.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application and CV to [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
